name: Energy Recovery, Inc.
business: Energy Recovery designs and manufactures energy-saving pressure exchanger technology for water treatment and industrial applications. Its products are used in seawater reverse osmosis desalination and wastewater treatment. The company also developed a CO2 refrigeration product but wound down operations in 2026.
sellsTo: OEM small to medium desalination and wastewater systems

exposures.sentence: The PX, which we believe is today’s industry standard in energy recovery in desalination, establishes a value proposition by reducing energy use by up to 60% in SWRO facilities.
We have introduced a number of products designed specifically for the wastewater market in the last few years, including the Ultra High-Pressure PX family of products and the low pressure PX.
On February 25, 2026, we decided to wind down operations of the CO2 retail grocery business within our Emerging Technologies segment due to a fundamental change in the outlook of the business.

catalysts.event: Wind down of CO2 retail grocery business
catalysts.sentence: On February 25, 2026, we decided to wind down operations of the CO2 retail grocery business within our Emerging Technologies segment due to a fundamental change in the outlook of the business.
We expect to substantially complete the wind down in the first quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Global freshwater demand will exceed supply by 40% by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: It has been projected by the United Nations General Assembly that by 2030, global freshwater demand will exceed freshwater supply by 40%.

tamClaims.claim: Desalination plants using our products produce over 43 million cubic meters of water per day
tamClaims.sentence: Worldwide seawater desalination plants using our products produce over 43 million cubic meters of water per day (m3/day).
